title: Non-Conformance Management
subtitle: Manage system-wide non-conformance status and corrective actions

toasts.versionMismatch: Someone else modified this record. Please try again.
toasts.fetchFailed: Failed to load the latest information.
toasts.versionConflict: Someone else modified this first. Please refresh and try again.

list.emptyWithFiltersDescription: Try changing or resetting the filters.
list.emptyNoFiltersDescription: You can register a non-conformance from the equipment detail page.
list.searchPlaceholder: Search by equipment name, management no., cause...

prerequisite.repairNeeded: requires a repair record before corrective action.
prerequisite.recalibrationNeeded: requires a new calibration before corrective action.
prerequisite.repairBlocked: You can complete the corrective action after registering a repair record.
prerequisite.recalibrationBlocked: You can complete the corrective action after receiving a new calibration.

closure.empty: No closure notes have been recorded.

attachments.title: Attachments
attachments.hint: Upload site photos or supporting evidence.
attachments.uploadPartialFailed: {failed} photo(s) failed to upload. Others were saved.
attachments.deleteConfirmBody: Delete {name}? Recoverable for 30 days after deletion for audit trail.

infoCard.repairNeededDescription: {type} type non-conformances recommend linking a repair record. You can register a corrective action after repair is completed.
infoCard.repairNotNeeded: Repair is not required for this type.

calibrationCard.overdueDescription: {type} non-conformances require a new calibration before corrective action. Once the calibration is registered and approved, it will be automatically applied.
calibrationCard.failureDescription: {type} non-conformance. Review the calibration status and recalibrate if necessary.

editDialog.title: Edit Non-Conformance
editDialog.description: Edit the cause and action plan of this non-conformance.
editDialog.causePlaceholder: Describe the non-conformance cause in detail

repairDialog.title: Register Repair Record
repairDialog.description: Register a repair record and automatically link it to this non-conformance.

confirm.title: Confirm repair registration
confirm.subtitle: Registering repair history with the content below. This action cannot be undone.
confirm.hint: Once registered, this NC will be linked and eligible for closure. Go back to edit.

validation.descriptionMin: Repair description must be at least 10 characters.

open_operator.title: Enter your corrective action
open_operator.body: Record how you resolved the root cause in the correction section below, then click 'Mark as Corrected' to request review from the technical manager.

open_manager.title: Waiting for operator's corrective action
open_manager.body: Closure approval is not available until the operator enters the correction details. You can edit the cause and action plan via 'Edit' if needed.

openRejected_operator.title: Review the rejection reason and resubmit
openRejected_operator.body: Check the rejection reason in the banner above, update the correction details, then click 'Mark as Corrected' again.

openRejected_manager.title: Waiting for resubmission
openRejected_manager.body: The rejection reason has been sent to the operator. The status will automatically change to 'Corrected' once resubmitted.

openBlockedRepair_operator.title: Register repair history first
openBlockedRepair_operator.body: Damage-type non-conformances require repair history registration before correction. Complete 'Register Repair History' below to enable correction.

openBlockedRepair_manager.title: Repair history required first
openBlockedRepair_manager.body: Correction and closure approval are available only after repair history is registered. Ask the operator to register repair if needed.

openBlockedRecalibration_operator.title: Complete recalibration first
openBlockedRecalibration_operator.body: Calibration-overdue non-conformances require a new calibration before correction. After registering and getting the calibration approved, you can enter the corrective action.

openBlockedRecalibration_manager.title: Recalibration required first
openBlockedRecalibration_manager.body: Correction and closure approval are available only after a new calibration record is registered.

openBlockedRecalibration_quality_manager.title: Recalibration required
openBlockedRecalibration_quality_manager.body: Corrective action is available after recalibration is completed. Please request recalibration from the calibration team.

corrected_operator.title: Waiting for technical manager's closure approval
corrected_operator.body: Your correction has been submitted. Waiting for the technical manager's closure approval. If rejected, the reason will appear in the banner above.

corrected_manager.title: Decide on closure
corrected_manager.body: Review the correction details, then choose 'Approve Closure' or 'Reject Correction' below. A reason is required for rejection.

closed_all.title: Non-conformance processing complete
closed_all.body: This non-conformance has been closed. Editing and status changes are locked to protect the audit trail.

dialog.closeDescription: This will close the non-conformance. The status cannot be changed after closure.
dialog.rejectDescription: Reject the corrective action and request re-action.

actionBar.hintNeedsCorrectionApproval: After completing the action, technical manager approval is required for closure.
actionBar.hintWaitingApproval: Waiting for technical manager closure approval.
actionBar.hintNeedsContent: Please enter corrective action content first

approvals.title: Non-Conformance Closure Approval
approvals.description: Approve equipment resumption for corrected non-conformances. (Technical Manager only)
approvals.infoMessage:
The list below shows non-conformance records in corrected status.
Upon closure approval, the equipment will be changed back to available status.

notFound.title: Non-conformance not found
notFound.description:
The requested non-conformance record does not exist or has been deleted.
Please check the non-conformance ID.
